backups_target_kind_xor.name: backups_target_kind_xor
backups_target_kind_xor.value:
("backups"."target_kind" = 'database' and "backups"."database_id" is not null and "backups"."project_id" is null)
          or ("backups"."target_kind" = 'project' and "backups"."project_id" is not null and "backups"."database_id" is null)

dev_ssh_user_has_credential.name: dev_ssh_user_has_credential
dev_ssh_user_has_credential.value: "dev_ssh_user"."public_key" is not null or "dev_ssh_user"."password_enc" is not null
